'''chonganaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:publicized|publicized]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:publicized|publicized]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chonganaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chonganithi|chonganithi]] || [[word:chonganiji|chonganiji]] || [[word:chonganishi|chonganishi]] || [[word:chonganiki|chonganiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chonganuthuthu|chonganuthuthu]] || [[word:chonganujuju|chonganujuju]] || [[word:chonganushushu|chonganushushu]] || [[word:chonganukuku|chonganukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chonganuthu|chonganuthu]] || [[word:chonganuju|chonganuju]] || [[word:chonganushu|chonganushu]] || [[word:chonganuku|chonganuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chonganufthuf|chonganufthuf]] || [[word:chonganufjuf|chonganufjuf]] || [[word:chonganufshuf|chonganufshuf]] || [[word:chonganufkuf|chonganufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chonganethe|chonganethe]] || [[word:chonganeje|chonganeje]] || [[word:chonganeshe|chonganeshe]] || [[word:chonganeke|chonganeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chonganothotho|chonganothotho]] || [[word:chonganojojo|chonganojojo]] || [[word:chonganoshosho|chonganoshosho]] || [[word:chonganokoko|chonganokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chonganotho|chonganotho]] || [[word:chonganojo|chonganojo]] || [[word:chonganosho|chonganosho]] || [[word:chonganoko|chonganoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chonganofthof|chonganofthof]] || [[word:chonganofjof|chonganofjof]] || [[word:chonganofshof|chonganofshof]] || [[word:chonganofkof|chonganofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfthĂŻf|chonganĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfjĂŻf|chonganĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfshĂŻf|chonganĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfkĂŻf|chonganĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chonganĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chonganĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chonganĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chonganĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfthĂŻf|chonganĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfjĂŻf|chonganĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfshĂŻf|chonganĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfkĂŻf|chonganĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfthĂŻf|chonganĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfjĂŻf|chonganĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfshĂŻf|chonganĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chonganĂŻfkĂŻf|chonganĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chonganĂŠthĂŠ|chonganĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chonganĂŠjĂŠ|chonganĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chonganĂŠshĂŠ|chonganĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chonganĂŠkĂŠ|chonganĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chonganathatha|chonganathatha]] || [[word:chonganajaja|chonganajaja]] || [[word:chonganashasha|chonganashasha]] || [[word:chonganakaka|chonganakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chonganatha|chonganatha]] || [[word:chonganaja|chonganaja]] || [[word:chonganasha|chonganasha]] || [[word:chonganaka|chonganaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chonganafthaf|chonganafthaf]] || [[word:chonganafjaf|chonganafjaf]] || [[word:chonganafshaf|chonganafshaf]] || [[word:chonganafkaf|chonganafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chonganasha|chonganasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chonganshĂ«sha|chonganshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chonganrosha|chonganrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chonganmusha|chonganmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chonganyasha|chonganyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochongankshĂ«sha|gochongankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochongankrosha|gochongankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochongankmusha|gochongankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochongankyasha|gochongankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chonganganasha|chonganganasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chonganganshĂ«sha|chonganganshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chonganganrosha|chonganganrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chonganganmusha|chonganganmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chonganganyasha|chonganganyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochongangankshĂ«sha|gochongangankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochongangankrosha|gochongangankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochongangankmusha|gochongangankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochongangankyasha|gochongangankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chengĂŠnasha|chengĂŠnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chengĂŠnshĂ«sha|chengĂŠnshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chengĂŠnrosha|chengĂŠnrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chengĂŠnmusha|chengĂŠnmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chengĂŠnyasha|chengĂŠnyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochengĂŠnkshĂ«sha|gochengĂŠnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochengĂŠnkrosha|gochengĂŠnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochengĂŠnkmusha|gochengĂŠnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochengĂŠnkyasha|gochengĂŠnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chongfanasha|chongfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chongfanshĂ«sha|chongfanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chongfanrosha|chongfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chongfanmusha|chongfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chongfanyasha|chongfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochongfankshĂ«sha|gochongfankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochongfankrosha|gochongfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochongfankmusha|gochongfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochongfankyasha|gochongfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
